creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wxs         2011-08-17 13:02:55 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net/isc-dhcp41-server Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/isc-dhcp41-server/files extra-patch-dhcp-4.1.1-ldap.patch 
  Log:
  - Apply an extra patch to fix the LDAP breakage that happened with the last
    update. It should be noted that LDAP support is built in to 4.2, so people
    are encouraged to move to that if you want LDAP support.
  
  PR:             ports/159830
  Submitted by:   Douglas William Thrift <douglas@douglasthrift.net> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.26      +1 -0      ports/net/isc-dhcp41-server/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/net/isc-dhcp41-server/files/extra-patch-dhcp-4.1.1-ldap.patch (new)
